_comment: MigraAI model qualification manifest — the record of truth for the Capability Router. mode=enforced serves ONLY approved models in production; rejected AND deprecated models are never served (a retired model never silently returns); unlisted installed models are evaluation-only. Vision models form the Vision Registry (GET /api/ai/vision-registry) and follow the same discipline: a vision model becomes the default only after it is licensed, measured (scripts/benchmark-vision.mjs vs eval/migraai-vision-eval-set.json), and proven. See docs/migraai-model-catalog.md + docs/migraai-vision-registry.md. Benchmarks: eval/results/. Edit here + restart brain-service (or reload) to change routing.

qwen2.5-coder:7b.reason: 127 tok/s, 100% GPU, eval 7/9 (strong coding; refusal cases weaker)

qwen3-coder:30b.reason: 66 tok/s (MoE 30B-A3B, 56% GPU offload), eval 9/9 — strongest all-rounder

deepseek-r1:14b.reason: reasoning; 38 tok/s, 100% GPU. Passes the same 7/9 threshold under the corrected reasoning-aware eval. Chain-of-thought never surfaced.

evaluation.vision: 79% overall, FAILED the OCR exact-text gate — misread invoice 'MG-4471'->'MG-471' and '$1,284.50'->'$1,936'

llava:latest.reason: DEPRECATED — superseded by qwen2.5vl:7b (qualified 2026-07-15). Retired for two reasons: (1) cannot reliably OCR (fabricated invoice digits under the deterministic OCR fixture), and (2) commercial license UNRESOLVED (Vicuna/Llama-derived weights). Never served again (retired, fail-closed).

evaluation.vision: 94% overall, PASS. OCR exact-gate ✓ (read 'MG-4471' + '$1,284.50' verbatim); UI/code/diagram/chart/screenshot all 100%; 62.9 tok/s

qwen2.5vl:7b.reason: QUALIFIED vision default. Apache-2.0 (unambiguous commercial use). Proven via scripts/benchmark-vision.mjs against deterministic ground truth — NOT grandfathered. Supersedes llava, which failed the OCR gate.

minicpm-v:8b.license: MiniCPM Model License (commercial use permitted after registration)

evaluation.vision: 94% overall, PASS. OCR exact-gate ✓ (read 'MG-4471' + '$1,284.50' verbatim); UI/code/diagram/chart/screenshot all 100%; 69.8 tok/s; 5.47GB

minicpm-v:8b.reason: QUALIFIED BACKUP — passed the identical bar (94%, OCR ✓, same as qwen2.5vl:7b). Held `restricted` (evaluation-only, NOT the production default) because it shows no concrete advantage over the default (accuracy tie; latency +9% and size -8% are marginal/within variance) AND its commercial license requires registration (review-required) vs the default's clean Apache-2.0. Promote to `approved` + demote qwen2.5vl only on a demonstrated advantage.

llama3.2-vision:11b.reason: fails to load on Ollama 0.32 — unknown model architecture 'mllama' (HTTP 500). Never route to it.

deepseek-r1:32b.reason: dense 32B → ~56% GPU offload, slower than the qwen3-coder MoE; evaluation-only until a latency benchmark justifies production

qwen3:14b.reason: general/multilingual + tools + thinking, 9.3GB @ 100% GPU, 38.8 tok/s. Promoted on the corrected reasoning-aware eval — passes the SAME 7/9 threshold (no lower bar). Chain-of-thought never surfaced.

llama3.1:8b.reason: source-available, not OSI; 'Built with Llama' attribution + Meta AUP required. Not needed in production; evaluation-only.
